blended.narrative: Mt. Bachelor is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 14 inches of snowfall of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 5,205 ft. Looking ahead, 20 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 2.2" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Tomorrow: 13" of heavy snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Wednesday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Thursday: 3.2" of snow, highs of 20°F. Expect powder.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 4" over the past week. Current depth: 13".
